title: Applied Experienced
description: Applied Energistics 2 addon to handle experience
body:
An Applied Energistics 2 addon that integrates Experience.

 

This mod adds:

  • Experience Storage Cell (1k, 4k, 16k, 64k, 256k, creative)
  • Experience Portable Storage Cell (1k, 4k, 16k, 64k, 256k)
  • Experience Acceptor (converts xp to ae2 energy, similar to energy acceptor with FE/RF)
  • Storage bus strategy (posibility to read block that can handle experience from ExperienceLib)
  • Export bus strategy (posibility to extract xp to blocks that can handle experience from ExperienceLib)
  • Import bus strategy (posibility to import xp from blocks that can handle experience from ExperienceLib)
  • Experience Converter:
  • Converts fluid xp from tag `#c:experience` to xp -> ratio of conversion in config, default 250mB = 1 XP
  • Handle the player XP throw GUI:
  • Retrieve 1, 10, 100 or all possible levels from player
  • Give 1, 10, 100 or all possible levels from converter to player
  • All levels are based on the current player level

 

Discord : For questions or support, join the Discord Server : https://discord.gg/2XCPCVa59h
